;; Simple tokenizer and parser
(define (tokenize s)
  (let loop ((i 0) (tokens '()) (cur ""))
    (if (>= i (string-length s))
        (reverse (if (string=? cur "") tokens (cons cur tokens)))
        (let ((c (string-ref s i)))
          (cond
            ((char=? c #\space)
             (loop (+ i 1)
                   (if (string=? cur "") tokens (cons cur tokens))
                   ""))
            ((or (char=? c #\() (char=? c #\)))
             (loop (+ i 1)
                   (cons (string c)
                         (if (string=? cur "") tokens (cons cur tokens)))
                   ""))
            (else
             (loop (+ i 1) tokens (string-append cur (string c)))))))))

(define toks (tokenize expr))
(length toks)
(list-head toks 15)

(define (tokenize s)
  (let loop ((i 0) (tokens '()) (cur ""))
    (if (>= i (string-length s))
        (reverse (if (string=? cur "") tokens (cons cur tokens)))
        (let ((c (string-ref s i)))
          (cond
            ((char=? c #\space)
             (loop (+ i 1)
                   (if (string=? cur "") tokens (cons cur tokens))
                   ""))
            ((or (char=? c #\() (char=? c #\)))
             (loop (+ i 1)
                   (cons (string c)
                         (if (string=? cur "") tokens (cons cur tokens)))
                   ""))
            (else
             (loop (+ i 1) tokens (string-append cur (string c))))))))) 
(define toks (tokenize expr))
(length toks)

;; Parser: consumes from toks list, returns (value . rest)
(define (parse toks)
  (let ((t (car toks)))
    (cond
      ((string=? t "(")
       ;; parse A op B )
       (let* ((r1 (parse (cdr toks)))
              (a (car r1))
              (rest1 (cdr r1))
              (op (car rest1))
              (r2 (parse (cdr rest1)))
              (b (car r2))
              (rest2 (cdr r2)))
         ;; rest2 should start with ")"
         (cons (if (string=? op "E") (min a b) (+ a b))
               (cdr rest2))))
      (else
       (cons (string->number t) (cdr toks))))))

(define result (parse toks))
(car result)

;; Parse infix expression with fully parenthesized binary ops
;; tokens: ( ) numbers and operators o+ o*
(define (tokenize s)
  (let loop ((i 0) (toks '()))
    (if (>= i (string-length s))
        (reverse toks)
        (let ((c (string-ref s i)))
          (cond
            ((char=? c #\space) (loop (+ i 1) toks))
            ((char=? c #\() (loop (+ i 1) (cons 'LP toks)))
            ((char=? c #\)) (loop (+ i 1) (cons 'RP toks)))
            ((char=? c #\o)
             ;; read o+ or o*
             (let ((op (string (string-ref s i) (string-ref s (+ i 1)))))
               (loop (+ i 2) (cons (string->symbol op) toks))))
            ((char-numeric? c)
             (let inner ((j i))
               (if (and (< j (string-length s)) (char-numeric? (string-ref s j)))
                   (inner (+ j 1))
                   (loop j (cons (string->number (substring s i j)) toks))))))))))

(define toks (tokenize expr-str))
(length toks)

;; Parse: each parenthesized expr is (LP expr OP expr RP) or number
(define (parse toks)
  ;; returns (tree . rest)
  (let ((t (car toks)))
    (cond
      ((number? t) (cons t (cdr toks)))
      ((eq? t 'LP)
       (let* ((r1 (parse (cdr toks)))
              (left (car r1))
              (rest1 (cdr r1))
              (op (car rest1))
              (r2 (parse (cdr rest1)))
              (right (car r2))
              (rest2 (cdr r2)))
         ;; rest2 should start with RP
         (cons (list op left right) (cdr rest2)))))))

(define tree (car (parse toks)))
(eval tree)

;; {f,h,j} ∩ {a,c,d,e,f,g,h,i,j,l,n,o,p}
(define s2 (inter '(f h j) '(a c d e f g h i j l n o p)))

(define s5 (union s4 '(h)))

;; ({a,b,c,d,e,f,g,j,k,l,m,p} ∩ ({k,m,o} ∩ {b,c,d,f,h,j,k,m,o,p})) ∩ {b,f,k,l,m,o}

(define t3 (union t1 t2))

(define (union a b)
  (let loop ((xs b) (acc a))
    (cond ((null? xs) acc)
          ((member (car xs) acc) (loop (cdr xs) acc))
          (else (loop (cdr xs) (cons (car xs) acc))))))
(define (inter a b)
  (let loop ((xs a) (acc '()))
    (cond ((null? xs) (reverse acc))
          ((member (car xs) b) (loop (cdr xs) (cons (car xs) acc)))
          (else (loop (cdr xs) acc)))))
(define (sort-set s) (list-sort (lambda (x y) (string<? (symbol->string x) (symbol->string y))) s))

(define A (union '(a b c d f g h i j k m n o p) '(h)))

(define t1 (union '(b e m) (inter '(b e f j m p) '(f g l))))
(define t2 (inter (inter '(a b c d e f g j k l m p) (inter '(k m o) '(b c d f h j k m o p))) '(b f k l m o)))
(define t3 (union t1 t2))
(define s7 (union s6 t3))
(define s8 (inter '(g i) s7))
(define s9 (inter s8 '(a b d e f g h i k l m n)))
(define u1 (union (inter '(g h n) '(b h j k m n)) '(a b c e f g h j k l m o p)))
(define s10 (inter s9 u1))

(display (sort-set result))

  (let loop ((xs b) (acc a))
    (cond ((null? xs) acc)
          ((member (car xs) acc) (loop (cdr xs) acc))
          (else (loop (cdr xs) (cons (car xs) acc))))))
(define (myinter a b)
  (let loop ((xs a) (acc '()))
    (cond ((null? xs) (reverse acc))
          ((member (car xs) b) (loop (cdr xs) (cons (car xs) acc)))
          (else (loop (cdr xs) acc)))))
(define (mysort s) (sort s (lambda (x y) (string<? (symbol->string x) (symbol->string y)))))

(define A (myunion '(a b c d f g h i j k m n o p) '(h)))
(define s1 (myinter '(a b c d e f g h i j k l m o p) '(a b c d e g h i j k l m n)))
(define s2 (myinter '(f h j) '(a c d e f g h i j l n o p)))
(define s3 (myinter s1 s2))
(define s4 (myunion s3 '(a b p)))
(define s5 (myunion s4 '(h)))
(define s6 (myunion s5 '(a c d f h i j m o p)))
(define t1 (myunion '(b e m) (myinter '(b e f j m p) '(f g l))))
(define t2 (myinter (myinter '(a b c d e f g j k l m p) (myinter '(k m o) '(b c d f h j k m o p))) '(b f k l m o)))
(define t3 (myunion t1 t2))
(define s7 (myunion s6 t3))
(define s8 (myinter '(g i) s7))
(define s9 (myinter s8 '(a b d e f g h i k l m n)))
(define u1 (myunion (myinter '(g h n) '(b h j k m n)) '(a b c e f g h j k l m o p)))
(define s10 (myinter s9 u1))
(define result (myinter A s10))
(display (mysort result))

(define (I a b) (lset-intersection eq? a b))

  (U '(a c d e f g h i k m n o p)
     (U (U (U '(b c d e f g h i j k l m n o p) '(c d e f g i k l n o p))
           (I '(a b c d e h i j k l m n o p) '(a c m n p)))
        (U (I (I (I '(a b c e f h j k l m n o p)
                    (I '(g k n) '(a d g h i m n)))

(import (srfi 1))
(define (U a b) (lset-union eq? a b))
(define (I a b) (lset-intersection eq? a b))

;; Build inner-most expressions
(define s1 (I '(a d e i k l n) '(d f g i k l m n o p)))

;; Part A: ({a, d, g} ∪ ({a, c, e, f, h, i, j, n, o} ∩ {e}))
(define A (U '(a d g) (I '(a c e f h i j n o) '(e))))

;; Part B: (({b, c, g, h, i, j, l, n, o} ∪ {d, l}) ∩ {a, b, c, d, e, f, g, h, i, k, l, m, n, o, p})
(define B (I (U '(b c g h i j l n o) '(d l)) '(a b c d e f g h i k l m n o p)))

;; Part C: ({a, b, c, d, e, f, g, h, i, j, k, l, n, o, p} ∩ {b, f, g, i, m})
(define C (I '(a b c d e f g h i j k l n o p) '(b f g i m)))

;; Part D: (B ∪ C) ∩ ({b, c, d, e, f, g, k, l, m, n, o} ∪ {a, b, c, d, e, f, g, h, i, j, k, l, n, o, p})
(define D (I (U B C) (U '(b c d e f g k l m n o) '(a b c d e f g h i j k l n o p))))

;; Part E: A ∩ D
(define E (I A D))

;; Part F: ({a, f, g, k, m, n, o} ∩ {a, b, c, d, e, i, j, k, l, m, n})
(define F (I '(a f g k m n o) '(a b c d e i j k l m n)))

;; Part G: ({a, g, k, o, p} ∩ {c, d, e, f, g, i, l, o})
(define G (I '(a g k o p) '(c d e f g i l o)))

;; Part H: G ∪ {a, c, e, f, g, i, k, l, m, n, p}
(define H (U G '(a c e f g i k l m n p)))

;; Part I1: F ∪ H
(define I1 (U F H))

;; Part J: ({i, k, n, o} ∪ {c, d, f})
(define J (U '(i k n o) '(c d f)))

;; Part K: ({f, k} ∩ {a, b, c, e, f, g, h, i, k, m, n, o, p})
(define K (I '(f k) '(a b c e f g h i k m n o p)))

;; Part L: J ∪ K
(define L (U J K))

;; Part M: L ∪ {c, f, o, p}
(define M (U L '(c f o p)))

;; Part N: I1 ∪ M
(define N (U I1 M))

;; Part O: E ∪ N
(define O (U E N))

;; Final: s1 ∩ O
(define final (I s1 O))
(sort final (lambda (x y) (string<? (symbol->string x) (symbol->string y))))

(import (wile algebra))
(define (U . args) (fold set-union '() args))
(define (I a b) (set-intersect a b))
(define (sset lst) (sort (lambda (x y) (string<? (symbol->string x) (symbol->string y))) lst))

(define A (I '(b c f g j k l n o p) '(k)))
(define B (set-union '(c d e f h i j k l m n p) '(b c d e i j k o)))
(define part1 (I A B))

(define C (set-union '(a c d e f g h i j k l m n o p) (I '(c h i j) '(a c d f g i k m p))))
(define D (I '(e l o) (I '(h) '(a b d e f g h i j k l o p))))
(define part2 (set-union C D))

(define left (set-union part1 part2))

(define E (I '(b d e f g i j k o p) '(a b c d e f g h i j k l m o p)))
(define F1 (set-union '(b d f g k p) (I '(a c d g j k m p) '(c f k))))
(define inner (set-union (set-union '(c d g h j m n p) '(b c d e f g h i j k m o p)) '(a d)))
(define inner2 (I inner '(a b c h j l n o p)))
(define F2 (set-union (set-union '(c i o) inner2) '(k p)))
(define F (set-union F1 F2))
(define right-inner (I E F))
(define right (set-union right-inner '(a m o)))

(define result (set-union left right))
(sset result)

(import (wile algebra))
(define (sset lst) (sort (lambda (x y) (string<? (symbol->string x) (symbol->string y))) lst))

(define A (set-intersect '(b c f g j k l n o p) '(k)))
(define B (set-union '(c d e f h i j k l m n p) '(b c d e i j k o)))
(define part1 (set-intersect A B))

(define C (set-union '(a c d e f g h i j k l m n o p) (set-intersect '(c h i j) '(a c d f g i k m p))))
(define D (set-intersect '(e l o) (set-intersect '(h) '(a b d e f g h i j k l o p))))
(define part2 (set-union C D))

(define left (set-union part1 part2))

(define E (set-intersect '(b d e f g i j k o p) '(a b c d e f g h i j k l m o p)))
(define F1 (set-union '(b d f g k p) (set-intersect '(a c d g j k m p) '(c f k))))
(define inner (set-union (set-union '(c d g h j m n p) '(b c d e f g h i j k m o p)) '(a d)))
(define inner2 (set-intersect inner '(a b c h j l n o p)))
(define F2 (set-union (set-union '(c i o) inner2) '(k p)))
(define F (set-union F1 F2))
(define right-inner (set-intersect E F))
(define right (set-union right-inner '(a m o)))

(define result (set-union left right))
(display (sset left)) (newline)
(display (sset right)) (newline)
(sset result)

arguments.code:
(import (wile algebra))
(define (S . xs) (map symbol->string xs))
(define (sset lst) (sort string<? lst))

(define A (set-intersect (S 'b 'c 'f 'g 'j 'k 'l 'n 'o 'p) (S 'k)))
(define B (set-union (S 'c 'd 'e 'f 'h 'i 'j 'k 'l 'm 'n 'p) (S 'b 'c 'd 'e 'i 'j 'k 'o)))
(define part1 (set-intersect A B))

(define C (set-union (S 'a 'c 'd 'e 'f 'g 'h 'i 'j 'k 'l 'm 'n 'o 'p) (set-intersect (S 'c 'h 'i 'j) (S 'a 'c 'd 'f 'g 'i 'k 'm 'p))))
(define D (set-intersect (S 'e 'l 'o) (set-intersect (S 'h) (S 'a 'b 'd 'e 'f 'g 'h 'i 'j 'k 'l 'o 'p))))
(define part2 (set-union C D))

(define left (set-union part1 part2))

(define E (set-intersect (S 'b 'd 'e 'f 'g 'i 'j 'k 'o 'p) (S 'a 'b 'c 'd 'e 'f 'g 'h 'i 'j 'k 'l 'm 'o 'p)))
(define F1 (set-union (S 'b 'd 'f 'g 'k 'p) (set-intersect (S 'a 'c 'd 'g 'j 'k 'm 'p) (S 'c 'f 'k))))
(define inner (set-union (set-union (S 'c 'd 'g 'h 'j 'm 'n 'p) (S 'b 'c 'd 'e 'f 'g 'h 'i 'j 'k 'm 'o 'p)) (S 'a 'd)))
(define inner2 (set-intersect inner (S 'a 'b 'c 'h 'j 'l 'n 'o 'p)))
(define F2 (set-union (set-union (S 'c 'i 'o) inner2) (S 'k 'p)))
(define F (set-union F1 F2))
(define right-inner (set-intersect E F))
(define right (set-union right-inner (S 'a 'm 'o)))

(define result (set-union left right))
(display "left: ") (display (sset left)) (newline)
(display "right: ") (display (sset right)) (newline)
(display "result: ") (display (sset result)) (newline)

(define (I a b) (sort symbol<? (filter (lambda (x) (member x b)) a)))
(define (symbol<? x y) (string<? (symbol->string x) (symbol->string y)))

;; Define each set
(define S1 '(b d e h m o p))
(define S2 '(a b d e i j l m n o))

(define S11 '(a b d e f g h i j m n))
(define S12 '(a b c d e f g h j k l m n o p))

(define S13 '(a b c d h i j k l m n o p))
(define S14 '(a b c e f g h i k m n))

(define S22 '(b c e f g h i j l n p))
(define S23 '(f h i j))
(define S24 '(d f g h n p))

;; Left side: ((((S1 ∩ S2) ∩ (S3 ∪ S4)) ∩ ((S5 ∩ (S6 ∩ S7)) ∩ (S8 ∩ S9))) ∪ (S10 ∪ (S11 ∩ S12)))
(define L1 (I S1 S2))
(define L2 (U S3 S4))

(define L4 (I S6 S7))

(define L9 (I S11 S12))
(define L10 (U S10 L9))
(define LEFT (U L8 L10))
(display "LEFT: ") (display LEFT) (newline)

;; Right side: (((((S13 ∩ S14) ∩ S15) ∩ (S16 ∩ S17)) ∪ S18) ∩ ((S19 ∩ S20) ∩ S21)) ∪ ((S22 ∪ S23) ∩ S24)

(define R6 (I S19 S20))
(define R7 (I R6 S21))
(define R8 (I R5 R7))
(define R9 (U S22 S23))
(define R10 (I R9 S24))
(define RIGHT (U R8 R10))
(display "RIGHT: ") (display RIGHT) (newline)

(define ANS (I LEFT RIGHT))
(display "ANSWER: ") (display ANS) (newline)

(import (srfi 1))
(define (U . sets) (fold (lambda (a b) (lset-union eq? a b)) '() sets))
(define (I . sets) (fold (lambda (a b) (lset-intersection eq? a b)) (car sets) (cdr sets)))

(define A1 (U '(a b d e f g h i j k l m o p) (U '(e f h i k l n o) '(a i j n p))))
(define A2-inner (U (U '(c d e f g h i j k l m n o p) '(c e g h j k n p)) '(b c g h i j k l m o p)))
(define A2-inner2 (I '(e f g h i j k l m n p) '(a b c d e g m n o)))
(define A2 (I '(a b c d e f g h i k l p) (I A2-inner A2-inner2)))
(define left (I A1 A2))

;; Right side
(define R1 (I '(c o) (I '(m) '(b c d e g j n o p))))
(define R2a (I (U '(b) '(b e f h i k l m n o p))
               (U (I '(a b c d e f g h i j k l m o p) '(a h i j l o))
                  '(a b c d e g i j k m n o p))))
(define R2b-inner (I (U '(b e p) '(a b d e f h j l n o p)) '(a)))
(define R2b (I (U '(b c d e f g h l m n o p) R2b-inner) (U '(c h i l n) '(h))))
(define R2 (U R2a R2b))
(define right (U R1 R2))

(define result (I left right))
(sort result (lambda (a b) (string<? (symbol->string a) (symbol->string b))))

           (I (I '(a c h i j l p) '(a b c d f g h i j k l m o p))
              '(j l o))))

            (I (U '(k o) '(c g i l n o))
               (U (I '(a c d f g i j k l m n o p) '(e h j l m))
                  '(a b c d e f g h j l m)))
            (U
              (U (I '(a b d i j n o) '(a c g n o))
                 (I '(b j k)
                    (I (U '(c n) (U '(a b c e f h j l n p) '(a b c d e g h i j k l m n o p)))
                       (U '(b d e h i j k l o p) '(c d e f h i j k m n)))))
              (U '(a b c d g h i j l m n o) '(a d e g k l))))
          (I '(a f i j o)
             (U (I (U '(f k n p) '(a c h k l m o p))
                   '(a b c d e f g h i j k l m n p))
                (I '(a i n) '(c i j k l m)))))
        (I
          (U (I '(b d f h n) (I '(b c f j) '(a b c d f h i k l m n o p)))

(import (srfi 1))
(define (U . sets) (fold (lambda (s acc) (lset-union eq? acc s)) '() sets))
(define (I . sets) (if (null? sets) '() (fold (lambda (s acc) (lset-intersection eq? acc s)) (car sets) (cdr sets))))
(define (S . xs) xs)

(define result
  (I
    (I
      (U
        (I (U (S 'a 'b 'c 'e 'f 'g 'h 'i 'j 'k 'l 'm 'n 'o) (S 'b 'c 'd 'e 'f 'g 'h 'i 'j 'k 'l 'm 'n 'o 'p))
           (I (U (S 'a 'd 'e 'h 'i 'j 'l) (S 'a 'b 'f 'h 'j 'l 'o)) (I (S 'h 'i 'p) (S 'c 'd))))
        (I
          (U
            (I (S 'a 'c 'd 'e 'f 'g 'h 'i 'j 'k 'l 'm 'n 'o 'p)
               (I
                 (I (S 'a 'c 'd 'e 'i 'j 'k 'l 'm 'o 'p)
                    (U (S 'a 'b 'c 'e 'f 'g 'h 'i 'j 'k 'l 'm 'n 'o)
                       (I (U (S 'a 'b 'c 'd 'e 'f 'g 'h 'i 'l 'm 'n 'p) (S 'a 'c 'd 'f 'g 'h 'j 'k 'l 'm 'n 'o 'p))
                          (U (S 'd 'e 'g 'h 'i 'l 'm 'o) (S 'a 'c 'd 'e 'f 'g 'h 'i 'm 'n 'o)))))
                 (I (S 'l 'n) (S 'b 'e 'f 'i 'j 'm 'n))))
            (I (S 'a 'c 'd 'e 'f 'g 'h 'i 'j 'k 'l 'm 'p) (S 'n)))
          (S 'd 'k)))
      (I
        (U (I (S 'a) (S 'a 'b 'c 'd 'g 'i 'j 'k 'm 'n)) (S 'b 'c 'e 'g 'h 'j 'k 'l 'm 'n))
        (I (U (S 'a 'b 'c 'd 'e 'f 'g 'h 'i 'j 'k 'l 'm 'o 'p) (S 'b 'c 'h 'i 'n))
           (U (S 'b 'c 'p) (S 'a 'b 'd 'e 'h 'j 'k 'l 'n)))))
    (U
      (I
        (U (U (S 'a 'b 'c 'd 'e 'f 'g 'h 'i 'j 'k 'l 'm 'n 'o) (S 'm))
           (I (S 'a 'b 'e 'f 'g 'i 'k 'l 'n 'o) (S 'a 'b 'c 'd 'e 'f 'g 'i 'j 'k 'l 'm 'o 'p)))
        (S 'b 'd 'f 'h 'k 'l 'n))
      (I
        (U
          (U (U (U (I (S 'a 'c 'd 'f 'h 'i 'j 'k 'l 'm 'n 'o 'p) (S 'g 'm)) (S 'a 'b 'c 'd 'f 'i 'j 'k 'm 'n 'o)) (S 'a 'c 'd 'h 'j 'k 'm 'p))
             (U (S 'a 'b 'c 'd 'e 'g 'h 'i 'j 'k 'l 'm 'n 'o 'p)
                (I (I (S 'e 'f) (S 'a 'b 'c 'd 'e 'f 'g 'i 'j 'k 'l 'm 'o 'p))
                   (U (S 'b 'c 'm 'p) (S 'a 'b 'c 'e 'f 'h 'i 'j 'k 'l 'm 'n 'o 'p)))))
          (U
            (U
              (I (I (U (S 'b 'c 'd 'e 'f 'h 'j 'l 'o 'p) (U (S 'b 'd 'i 'j) (I (S 'a 'b 'c 'd 'e 'g 'h 'j) (S 'a 'f 'k)))) (S 'l)) (S 'e 'f 'g 'j 'p))
              (S 'a 'b 'c 'd 'e 'f 'h 'i 'j 'l 'm 'o 'p))
            (U

(sort LESS? LST) → list
  Form: procedure
  Return a list containing the elements of LST sorted according
  to the comparison procedure LESS?. The input list is not modified.
  Uses a stable merge sort: equal elements preserve their original
  order.
  Parameters:
    LESS? : procedure -- a two-argument comparison predicate
    LST : list
  Returns: list
  Category: lists
  Keywords: sort, order, merge sort, stable, list

(sort LESS? LST) → list
  Form: procedure
  Return a list containing the elements of LST sorted according
  to the comparison procedure LESS?. The input list is not modified.
  Uses a stable merge sort: equal elements preserve their original
  order.

  Returns: list
  Category: lists
  Keywords: sort, order, merge sort, stable, list

(sort LESS? LST) → list
  Form: procedure
  Return a list containing the elements of LST sorted according
  to the comparison procedure LESS?. The input list is not modified.
  Uses a stable merge sort: equal elements preserve their original
  order.
  Parameters:
    LESS? : procedure -- a two-argument comparison predicate
    LST : list
  Returns: list
  Category: lists
  Keywords: sort, order, merge sort, stable, list
